title: Autocrafters
description: Adds Crafter-style counterparts for other manual workbenches, e.g. loom and grindstone.
body:
# AutoCrafters This mod adds new **redstone** components, that can **automate** various workbenches, just like a Crafter can be used to automate the crafting table. They behave just like the Crafter in every way: * Hoppers, droppers and other item transfer methods **can insert** items into AutoCrafters. * Hoppers and other item extraction methods **can extract** input items. * Hoppers and droppers can interact with **all sides** of the block. * Resulting items are **crafted** on **redstone signal**. You can **not** craft manually, even if you really wanted to. * After crafting an item, it is **inserted** in an inventory in **front** of the AutoCrafter. If the inventory does not accept the item, the **rest is dropped** on the ground. * Redstone Comparators can interact with AutoCrafters - by default they output amount of non-empty slots. * Multiple players can access GUI at once. And yes, you are more than welcome to use this mod in **modpacks**. For example, AutoCrafters integrate nicely with [AE2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2). ## Weaver
This AutoCrafter dyes banners.
  • Precise machine work can apply more layers than doing so by hand (15 by default)!
  • Only dyes and banners can be input via automation.
  • Banner pattern item can only be inserted using GUI.
  • Dyeing pattern has to be selected manually to configure the machine.
![Automatic Loom dyeing incoming banners automatically](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Kt0jMecU/images/6328582387d5c825a04542e2a50b2694ab99a139.gif) ## Grinder
Recipe output corresponds exactly to a Grindstone.
  • Mods that affect vanilla Grindstone will affect the Grinder as well.
  • Has 2 inventory slots, both accessible via automation.
  • Only grindeable items can be input.
  • The difference from vanilla grindstone: its second slot must have the same type of item as the first. This quirk can be used to build sorting systems.
![Grinder outputting netherite sword and experience orbs](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Kt0jMecU/images/eebfd19c278a25db1d44fbc0e572fe5fd8d44502.gif) ## Stonecarver
This block does everything a Stonecutter does.
  • The recipe has to be selected in the gui manually, once.
  • Has 1 inventory slot, which only accepts cuttable items.
  • Synergizes with other other mods/datapacks that add more recipes to the Stonecutter.
